description: Recto: small fragment from a document. Mentions 'the city' and 'my sister.' Verso: mentions [...] bt. Mubāraka. May be a magical fragment, which would explain the use of the mother's name rather than the father's. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
